zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos於1134年之前與Richard Rullos在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos于1134年之前与Richard Rullos在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Rullos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tullis
meanings: Scottish (mainly Fife): probably a habitational name from the lands of Tullois (Fife). The placename appears to be from a Scots plural form of a word borrowed from Gaelic tulach ‘hillock’; compare Tulloch , Tullie .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos married Richard Rullos before 1134, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos a épousé Richard Rullos avant 1134, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos hat vor 1134 in England Richard Rullos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos lei sposato Richard Rullos prima del 1134, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Clotton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアクロットオン
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullosは1134年以前にイギリスでRichard Rullosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos(은)는 1134년 이전 영국에서 Richard Rullos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos casou-se com Richard Rullos antes 1134, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Rullos перед 1134 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Rullos se casó con Richard Rullos antes de 1134, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
